body.title: Remove retired worker_daemon.sh launch call from Igor startup
body.result: removed launch call site and dead DAEMON_PID_FILE/DAEMON_SCRIPT/worker-launch code from cc_queue.py
body.description:
Igor startup opens a new terminal window printing 'worker_daemon.sh is RETIRED'. Find the call site (likely cc_queue.py worker-launch verb or an igor boot hook) and remove it. Also remove dead constants DAEMON_PID_FILE/DAEMON_SCRIPT and the worker-launch verb from lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py lines ~1246-1299.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py; discovery needed for call site (grep for worker.daemon and worker-launch across all startup paths in ~/TheIgors and devices/igor/)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — remove the launch call and dead cc_queue.py code; OUT — leave worker_daemon.sh file itself intact (it is a documented archive with retirement notice)
**Test plan:** Start Igor via the igor launcher; verify no new terminal window appears with the RETIRED message; pytest passes
